description: You are a set designer furnishing a room. Using the furniture asset library at '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/furniture_library.blend', import the 'Table', 'Chair', and 'Bookshelf' objects. Position them realistically within the room so that all objects are on the floor (Z=0), do not overlap, and remain inside the room walls. Render the scene and save the image to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/assembled_room.png', and save the Blender project to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/assembled_room.blend'.
